tasks_today.prompt: A creepy game of paper, rock, scissors.

I am playing the game. In my first round, I choose Rock and lose. In the second round, I choose Paper and lose. In the third round, I choose Scissors and lose.  According to Rule 3, losing 3 times in a row triggers the Curse where the shadowy figure takes my place. But according to Rule 4, playing Rock, Paper, Scissors in that exact order triggers the Secret Move which screams and resets the game.  Both conditions were met simultaneously on my last move. Does the game reset completely, or am I cursed? Explain the exact priority order of your processing execution.
